items.title: Stale working tree in Scheduler: 7 files modified since 2026-07-03, plus an in-progress 0011 migration
Cattery handler warns about phantom sibling repo X:\YesAndCats (does not exist)
Refresh world3d class_name count in GDD and CLAUDE.md (10/22 -> 11/23)
Drive the Plaid takeover archive boundary from Plaid's real earliest_available_date so post-takeover history cannot double-count
items.reason: 2026-07-12 queue-drain-hourly: ASSESSED, deferred to an attended session. High-severity money-path correctness change (transactions_live double-count) in apps/api/src/plaid, auto_safe:false, and the item requires shipping via scripts/release.ps1 which this audit-only drain task is forbidden to run. Not urgent: Plaid is Sandbox-only (D-012), so live exposure is nil until Production is approved. Recommended fix (option 2, self-healing): in sync.applyAdded, after inserting source=plaid rows for a taken-over account, archive still-live source=upload CSV rows whose posted_date is now covered by Plaid backfill, reusing archived_reason=plaid_takeover so restoreArchive symmetry holds; add a regression test for a takeover with CSV rows predating the 90-day window. Left pending for attended pickup.

BR best-practices P3: author a Main -> World + GUI baseline scene and move static level assembly out of gameplay.gd (currently instantiates the whole game in code). s3/s10.

items.reason: 2026-07-13T08:41:47Z queue-drain-hourly: DEFERRED (attended/deploy session required). All read-only recovery is already staged at result_path (exact applied DDL for admin_set_flags_self_lockout_guard v20260630183939, reviews_and_ratings v20260630190120, waitlists v20260630233349, plus the 0006 photos-bucket reconciliation fact). The remaining steps are all outside the no-publish audit+queue lane and cannot be safely verified in this environment: committing the recovered files depends on a migration-numbering judgment that governs how supabase db push correlates local 000N labels to the remote timestamp-versioned schema_migrations history; the 0006 out-of-band photos bucket needs a db-push history reconciliation (bucket already live, do NOT re-run blind); and the clean-rebuild check requires a local supabase stack to confirm reviews+waitlist_entries apply before 0012_notification_resolver. A wrong call here risks breaking db push on a live schema holding buyer PII (waitlist_entries) and review authorship (live RLS is ON, no active breach). Moved off the pending auto-pick head so the hourly drain stops re-selecting an item it structurally cannot close; preserved for the next attended Cattery/Supabase session. See result_path for the full ship path.

HBH strategic, HIGH. The project ships nearly daily (v0.99.23 through v0.99.33) but every one of those versions is art wiring, the asset tracker, or GDD alignment. The milestone-critical path is untou

Skylight event creation is non-idempotent across all three front doors (web form, x-pin JSON API, inbound email). A retried POST, a re-delivered email, or a curl retry silently creates a duplicate cal

The Skylight lists/chores/tasks paths ride an unofficial reverse-engineered API whose request bodies were inferred, with no contract test to detect drift. Add a scheduled smoke probe that exercises on
Skylight has observability.enabled plus source maps, but the Worker emits no console output at all, so the top-level catch swallows every HTTP failure into a causeless 500. Add a console.error in the

Skylight's entire client runtime lives in untyped template-literal strings that tsc never checks, and the HTML-escape helper exists in two copies that can drift. Extract the client script to a real ty
Skylight's two event-write drivers have diverged: the Google path silently drops categoryIds, so flipping CALENDAR_DRIVER changes per-person colour-coding rather than swapping a driver transparently.

Skylight's primary event path (Google Calendar) has no token-refresh retry, so a stale or revoked cached access token hard-fails with no self-healing, unlike the Skylight client which recovers on a 40

In Skylight, a calendar write that succeeds but whose response body fails to parse throws, so the caller sees an error and retries, duplicating the event that already landed (compounds data-integrity-

A dropped inbound email in Skylight leaves no trace: MIME parsing runs outside handleEmail's try block and the whole handler is fire-and-forget under ctx.waitUntil, so a malformed message never reache

Skylight's only unauthenticated health surface reports ok:true regardless of downstream state, so a slow-burn failure (rotated service-account key, unshared calendar, reverse-API drift) stays green un

Skylight's inbound email ingestion has no Message-ID de-duplication, so a message delivered twice (dual path or routing retry) creates two calendar entries. Record processed Message-IDs in a short-TTL

When Skylight's 30-day auth cookie expires or the PIN is rotated while the PWA is open, a family member who taps Add gets a dead-end red 'unauthorized' with no way back to sign-in. Detect a 401 from /

Skylight's wrangler devDependency is caret-pinned to the EOL v3 major, whose bundled workerd predates the project's own compatibility_date, so the deploy toolchain is frozen and receives no runtime or

In Skylight, start/end ordering is sound when both endpoints share a format, but a mixed naive-versus-absolute pair (reachable from the JSON API or the LLM email parser) is compared across two time fr
